titleEn: Thailand and U.S. strengthen cooperation on produce pesticide testing
titleZh: 泰美加强农产品农药检测合作，聚焦边境检验与数据共享
summaryZh: 泰国食品药品监督管理局与美国农业部官员举行双边会谈，旨在加强进口新鲜水果、蔬菜和坚果的农药残留安全监管。双方讨论了协调监管标准、统一边境检验程序、实验室分析方法以及超标处理流程。泰方表示，技术交流将支持长期科学合作，使泰国检查员能够获取美国合规数据与共享网络。此举旨在保障公众健康的同时促进国际贸易。
featuredReason: 虽然该新闻主要聚焦农药残留检测与监管协调，但其中涉及的边境检验系统、数据共享网络和实验室分析技术，对智慧畜牧行业中种植业环节的食品安全追溯与自动化检测有间接参考价值。
contentFull: Thailand and U.S. strengthen cooperation on produce pesticide testing The Thai Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has held bilateral talks with United States agricultural officials to strengthen safety surveillance of imported fresh fruit, vegetables, and nuts. The meeting brought together representatives from the Thai FDA, the United States Department of Agriculture (USDA) Agricultural Attaché, and the Assisting Specialty Crop Exports (ASCE) initiative. Discussions focused on aligning regulatory standards and strengthening consumer protection related to pesticide residues. Dr Rungruethai Muanprasitporn, deputy secretary-general of the Thai FDA, hosted the delegation at the agency's One-Stop Service Centre in Bangkok. The discussions focused on harmonising border inspection systems and improving understanding of each country's food safety framework. Key topics included sampling methods at ports of entry, laboratory analysis for chemical residues, and enforcement procedures when imported consignments exceed statutory maximum residue limits (MRLs). Dr Rungruethai said coordination between regulatory agencies is important to maintain confidence in the domestic food supply chain. The U.S. delegation outlined its regulatory approach for monitoring and managing chemical residues in agricultural exports. The Thai FDA said the technical exchange is expected to support long-term scientific cooperation, allowing Thai inspectors to access U.S. compliance data and data-sharing networks. "This meeting marks an excellent opportunity to strengthen technical cooperation and share regulatory experiences between Thailand and the United States," Dr Rungruethai concluded. He added that future policy updates would remain based on scientific principles to protect public health while supporting international trade. translationZh: 泰国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）与美国农业官员举行了双边会谈，以加强对进口新鲜水果、蔬菜和坚果的安全监管。会议汇聚了泰国FDA、美国农业部（USDA）农业参赞以及特色作物出口援助倡议（ASCE）的代表。讨论重点围绕协调监管标准、加强消费者在农药残留方面的保护。泰国FDA副秘书长Rungruethai Muanprasitporn博士在曼谷该机构的一站式服务中心接待了代表团。讨论聚焦于协调边境检验系统，以及增进对彼此国家食品安全框架的理解。关键议题包括入境口岸的抽样方法、化学残留的实验室分析，以及当进口货物超过法定最大残留限量（MRL）时的执法程序。Rungruethai博士表示，监管机构之间的协调对于维持国内食品供应链的信心至关重要。美国代表团概述了其监测和管理农业出口中化学残留的监管方法。泰国FDA表示，此次技术交流预计将支持长期科学合作，使泰国检查员能够获取美国合规数据和数据共享网络。Rungruethai博士总结道：“这次会议是加强泰美技术合作、分享监管经验的绝佳机会。”他补充说，未来的政策更新将继续基于科学原则，以在支持国际贸易的同时保护公众健康。
contentHtml: The Thai Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has held bilateral talks with United States agricultural officials to strengthen safety surveillance of imported fresh fruit, vegetables, and nuts. The meeting brought together representatives from the Thai FDA, the United States Department of Agriculture…
